query.text: declare @unit varchar(128), @custID varchar(64) select @custID = '%#10$' + @ma_kh + '#%', @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end &FilterInitialize;&CheckRelativeProcess; exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding 'PD5', 'c93$000000', 'm93$', 'i93$', 'ngay_ct', 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', '000000', @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, '', @custID, 'stt_rec', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct', '', 'ngay_ct, so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, '', '', '1', '0', @unit, default, default, default, default, default, default, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
